notes: Backup PIN: set a 4-8 digit PIN in Settings, Security. When biometrics fail (wet fingers, sensor issues), a Use PIN option on the lock screen gets you in - it also works as the fallback when unlocking the sync key.
The PIN is stored as a salted hash, travels with your backups so it works on every device, and wrong attempts are throttled (30 second wait after 5 misses).
